zh.lifeSummary: 當Ryksa Piast de Pologne於1013年9月22日出生在波蘭可拉可福斯吉時，她的父親Mieszko II Lambert Piast II23歲，母親Richeza of Lotharingia16歲。她於1039年與King Béla I Árpád-házi of Hungary在波蘭結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1075年5月21日在匈牙利可馬洛姆艾斯特格姆享年61歲，埋葬在匈牙利托爾納可薩德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ryksa Piast de Pologne于1013年9月22日出生在波兰可拉可福斯吉时，她的父亲Mieszko II Lambert Piast II23岁，母亲Richeza of Lotharingia16岁。她于1039年与King Béla I Árpád-házi of Hungary在波兰结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1075年5月21日在匈牙利可馬洛姆艾斯特格姆享年61岁，埋葬在匈牙利托爾納可薩德。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Ryksa
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Dutch: variant, archaic or Americanized, of Rijks, a patronymic from a short form of an ancient Germanic personal name formed with rīc ‘power(ful)’.

nameMeanings.name: Piast
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Altered form of French and Walloon Piat: from the personal name Piat, from the Latin name Piatus ‘expiated’ (from the past participle of the verb pio ‘to appease; to expiate’). The name was borne by Saint Piatus of Tournai (in Wallonia, Belgium), who was martyred under the Roman Emperor Maximian c. 286 AD . Altered ending of the surname reflects the Canadian and American French practice of sounding the final -t. Compare Pyatt .
English (Lancashire and Cheshire): variant of   Pyatt  .

History: This surname (see 1 above) is listed along with the variant Pyatt in the (US) National Huguenot Society's register of qualified Huguenot ancestors and also in the similar register of the Huguenot Society of America.

variants.name: Pyatt
meanings: Mainly North American: transferred use of the surname, derived from a medieval given name representing a Norman French alteration of the Old English personal name Wīgheard, from wīg ‘war’ + heard ‘hardy, brave, strong’.

en.lifeSummary: When Ryksa Piast de Pologne was born on 22 September 1013, in Kraków, Poland, her father, Mieszko II Lambert Piast II, was 23 and her mother, Richeza of Lotharingia, was 16. She married King Béla I Árpád-házi of Hungary in 1039, in Poland. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters. She died on 21 May 1075, in Esztergom, Komárom, Hungary, at the age of 61, and was buried in Szekszárd, Tolna, Hungary.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ryksa Piast de Pologne est née le 22 septembre 1013, à krakowskie, Pologne, son père, Mieszko II Lambert Piast II, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Richeza of Lotharingia, avait 16 ans. Elle a épousé King Béla I Árpád-házi of Hungary en 1039, à Pologne. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 21 mai 1075, à Esztergom, Komárom, Hongrie, à l’âge de 61 ans, et a été enterrée à Szekszárd, Tolna, Hongrie.

de.lifeSummary: Als Ryksa Piast de Pologne am 22. September 1013 in Krakau, Polen geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Mieszko II Lambert Piast II 23 und ihre Mutter Richeza of Lotharingia 16. Sie hat 1039 in Polen King Béla I Árpád-házi of Hungary geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 21. Mai 1075 im Alter von 61 Jahren in Esztergom, Komárom, Ungarn und wurde in Szekszárd, Tolna, Ungarn begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Ryksa Piast de Pologne è nata il il 22 settembre 1013 nel krakowskie, Polonia, sua padre, Mieszko II Lambert Piast II, aveva 23 anni e sua madre, Richeza of Lotharingia, aveva 16 anni. Lei sposato King Béla I Árpád-házi of Hungary nel 1039, nel Polonia. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 21 maggio 1075, nel Esztergom, Komárom, Ungheria, all'età di 61 anni, e fu sepolta a Szekszárd, Tolna, Ungheria.

ja.lifeSummary: Ryksa Piast de Pologneが1013年9月22日にポーランドクラコウスキで生まれた時，父Mieszko II Lambert Piast IIは23歳，母Richeza of Lotharingiaは16歳であった。1039年にポーランドでKing Béla I Árpád-házi of Hungaryと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1075年5月21日にハンガリーコムaロムエスズテルゴムで61歳で死去し，ハンガリートルナスズエクスズaルドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Ryksa Piast de Pologne(이)가 1013년 9월 22일 폴란드 크라코우스키에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Mieszko II Lambert Piast II(은)는 23세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Richeza of Lotharingia(은)는 16세였다. 그녀는 1039년 폴란드에서 King Béla I Árpád-házi of Hungary(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1075년 5월 21일 헝가리 코a롬 스즈터고에서 61세의 나이로 사망했으며 헝가리 톨나 스즈크스즈a르드에 묻혔다.

mn.22 September 1013–21 May 1075: 1013 оны Есдүгээр сарын 22–1075 оны Тавдугаар сарын 21

pt.22 September 1013–21 May 1075: 22 de setembro de 1013–21 de maio de 1075
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ryksa Piast de Pologne nasceu em 22 de setembro de 1013, em krakowskie, Polônia, seu pai, Mieszko II Lambert Piast II, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Richeza of Lotharingia, tinha 16 anos. Ela casou-se com King Béla I Árpád-házi of Hungary em 1039, em Polônia. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 21 de maio de 1075, em Esztergom, Komárom, Hungria, com 61 anos, e foi sepultada em Szekszárd, Tolna, Hungria.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ryksa Piast de Pologne родилась 22 сентября 1013 г. в местности кракоуски, Польша, её отцу по имени Mieszko II Lambert Piast II было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Richeza of Lotharingia, 16. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени King Béla I Árpád-házi of Hungary в 1039 г. в местности Польша. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла 21 мая 1075 г. в местности эсзтиргом, комaром, Венгрия в возрасте 61 год и была похоронена в местности сзексзaрд, толна, Венгрия.

es.22 September 1013–21 May 1075: 22 de septiembre de 1013–21 de mayo de 1075
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Ryksa Piast de Pologne nació el 22 de septiembre de 1013, en krakowskie, Polonia, su papá, Mieszko II Lambert Piast II, tenía 23 años y su mamá, Richeza of Lotharingia, tenía 16 años. Se casó con King Béla I Árpád-házi of Hungary en 1039, en Polonia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 21 de mayo de 1075, en Esztergom, Komárom, Hungría, a la edad de 61 años, y fue sepultada en Szekszárd, Tolna, Hungría.
